name: Peppers & Shrimp
recipeInstructions:
1. Split the shrimp lengthwise with a sharp knife. Devein them without peeling.
2. Combine 2 cups of olive oil and red bell peppers in a heavy skillet. Heat slowly.
3. Cook gently until the peppers are tender but not browned. The oil will turn rose-colored.
4. Set the peppers aside. Pour the remaining oil into another skillet with garlic. Stew gently for 4-5 minutes, until golden and tender.
5. Scoop out the garlic oil and add it to the peppers.
6. Heat the garlic oil until it ripples. Add chili pepper and shrimp. Saute, tossing, until pink and just done.
7. Spoon the peppers and their oil into a serving dish. Surround with shrimp.
8. Serve with French bread. Each diner dips slices of bread in the oil, piles it with peppers, garlic, cheese, and shrimp.
